title: calawaya minutiflora
intro: Calawaya minutiflora, also known as "Peruvian mint" or "Andean mint", is a plant species native to the high-altitude regions of Peru. The leaves of the Calawaya minutiflora plant have been used for centuries in traditional medicine, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive issues, reduction of blood pressure, and anti-anxiety effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Calawaya minutiflora typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to experience its medicinal and health benefits.
